name: driver-ai-copilot
description: Driver AI Co-Pilot - Unified Full Stack Application

scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.start: npm run build && cd backend && python run.py
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && pip install -r requirements.txt
scripts.clean: cd frontend && rmdir /s /q dist 2>nul || echo "No dist folder to clean"
